entries.description: Iraq War launched on flawed intelligence regarding weapons of mass destruction; resulted in hundreds of thousands of deaths and long-term regional instability
entries.causation_evidence: Senate Intelligence Committee reports and Iraq Survey Group findings

entries.description: Chaotic withdrawal from Afghanistan: 13 U.S. service members killed and significant abandonment of allies and equipment
entries.causation_evidence: House Foreign Affairs Committee Afghanistan withdrawal report

entries.description: Early COVID-19 response failures: Mixed messaging, delayed action, and politicization contributed to high excess mortality
entries.causation_evidence: House Select Subcommittee on the Coronavirus Crisis report

entries.description: CIA enhanced interrogation program (torture) authorized and overseen at senior levels post-9/11
entries.causation_evidence: Senate Select Committee on Intelligence Torture Report

entries.description: Record levels of political polarization and erosion of trust in democratic institutions
entries.causation_evidence: Pew Research Center and Gallup long-term polling data

entries.description: January 6 Capitol attack and subsequent challenges to the peaceful transfer of power
entries.causation_evidence: House January 6 Select Committee final report

entries.description: Persistent mass incarceration and racial disparities in the criminal justice system
entries.causation_evidence: Sentencing Project and Bureau of Justice Statistics reports

entries.description: Victory in World War II and subsequent role in rebuilding Europe and Asia through the Marshall Plan
entries.causation_evidence: Historical records of the Marshall Plan and postwar reconstruction

entries.description: Civil Rights Act of 1964 and Voting Rights Act of 1965: Landmark legislation ending legal segregation and expanding voting rights
entries.causation_evidence: Congressional records and long-term demographic impact studies

entries.description: Leadership in establishing the post-WWII international order including the United Nations, NATO, and Universal Declaration of Human Rights
entries.causation_evidence: Official founding documents and diplomatic histories

entries.description: Operation Warp Speed: Rapid development and distribution of multiple COVID-19 vaccines in record time
entries.causation_evidence: HHS and Operation Warp Speed official reports
